task.title: Write implementation compiler skill contract
task.summary: Define implementation-mode instructions for executing one roadmap task, producing `implementation_build`, and requesting fresh validation before closure.

goal.outcome: Implementation mode gives agents exact build-before-validation lifecycle and production-grade task closure evidence.
acceptance: `codewiki-implementation` skill frontmatter triggers on executing one atomic roadmap task from a planning build or `/wiki-resume`.

Instructions state exact actions, tools, artifact-status coordination, TDD/test-design expectations, `codewiki_build kind=implementation` point, fresh validation handoff, task-close gate, and output format.
Instructions fix ordering so implementation build is compiled before gateway validation, and closure requires passing validation/content proof when policy requires it.
non_goals: Do not change validation gateway policy.
Do not implement arbitrary roadmap work; only implementation-mode skill/prompt guidance and supporting tests.
verification: Inspect implementation prompt and skill against validation-gateway spec.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Superseded TASK-096 implementation build with accepted planning-build traceability while preserving implementation compiler skill contract evidence.
checks_run: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck

evidence: Prompt/package smoke tests cover the new public implementation skill and package references.
TASK-076 restructure test covers package-local skill routing.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Reordered implementation loop and resume prompt guidance.
notes: Metadata remediation only: source content unchanged from original TASK-096 implementation; added accepted planning-build traceability for validation policy.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Prompt/package smoke tests cover the new public implementation skill and package references.

code_change_evidence: Reordered implementation loop and resume prompt guidance.

closure_brief.user_intent: Create a focused implementation compiler skill contract for executing one atomic roadmap task from planning or resume context.
implemented_changes: Added dedicated `codewiki-implementation` public skill with exact one-task implementation workflow.
Added implementation tool reference for artifact status, TDD/test-design evidence, implementation build, fresh validation handoff, and task-close gates.
Reordered implementation loop and resume prompt guidance so `implementation_build` is compiled before gateway validation.
Updated README and tests for the new public implementation skill surface.
Superseded the original implementation build with accepted planning-build traceability.
acceptance_evidence: Implementation skill triggers on one-task planning/resume context.
Artifact status, TDD/test-design, build-before-validation, fresh validation handoff, and close gates are explicit.
Accepted planning build is cited by this implementation build.
